title: Support member-level triggers for virtual interfaces (#5116)

features.name: continuous assignment to virtual interface member
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment statement that drives a virtual interface member, such as 'assign vif.a = b;' where vif is a virtual interface handle

features.name: always_comb with virtual interface member access
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that references a virtual interface member in the sensitivity list or body, where the member is accessed through a runtime-bound virtual interface handle

features.name: virtual interface with per-member trigger
features.description: Code should include a virtual interface declaration where members can be individually triggered, enabling fine-grained scheduling of combinational logic when specific members are written
